title: Design an ecological restoration project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design an ecological restoration project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop an ecological restoration project design brief

pcs.text: Identify client and key stakeholders for the project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify client and key stakeholders for the project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify client and key stakeholders for the project.

pcs.text: Consult with client and key stakeholders to establish purpose, scope, cultural considerations and budget of design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client and key stakeholders to establish purpose, scope, cultural considerations and budget of design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client and key stakeholders to establish purpose, scope, cultural considerations and budget of design.

pcs.text: Develop and confirm measurable ecological targets, goals and objectives for project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and confirm measurable ecological targets, goals and objectives for project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and confirm measurable ecological targets, goals and objectives for project.

pcs.text: Respond to design brief and agree on extent, scope and scale of project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Respond to design brief and agree on extent, scope and scale of project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respond to design brief and agree on extent, scope and scale of project.

pcs.text: Prepare project budget with the client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare project budget with the client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare project budget with the client.

pcs.text: Obtain or prepare a site base plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain or prepare a site base plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain or prepare a site base plan.

pcs.text: Identify legislative and regulatory implications for restoration work for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislative and regulatory implications for restoration work for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislative and regulatory implications for restoration work for site.

pcs.text: Review existing site data and information before site visit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review existing site data and information before site visit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review existing site data and information before site visit.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop an ecological restoration project design brief

elements.title: Undertake a site analysis

pcs.text: Identify the ecosystem and respective reference ecosystem for the project according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the ecosystem and respective reference ecosystem for the project according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the ecosystem and respective reference ecosystem for the project according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Specify and document reference ecosystem’s attributes according to current industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify and document reference ecosystem’s attributes according to current industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify and document reference ecosystem’s attributes according to current industry standards.

pcs.text: Inspect project site in preparation for design work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect project site in preparation for design work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect project site in preparation for design work.

pcs.text: Quantify, and indicate on base plan, elements and features of site biological condition of attributes and threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Quantify, and indicate on base plan, elements and features of site biological condition of attributes and threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Quantify, and indicate on base plan, elements and features of site biological condition of attributes and threats.

pcs.text: Record biophysical components of the site in base plan and site report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record biophysical components of the site in base plan and site report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record biophysical components of the site in base plan and site report.

pcs.text: Assess ecosystem recovery prospects and record limiting factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess ecosystem recovery prospects and record limiting factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess ecosystem recovery prospects and record limiting factors.

pcs.text: Determine options for ecological restoration interventions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine options for ecological restoration interventions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine options for ecological restoration interventions.

pcs.text: Assess and record the impact of surrounding ecosystem, land and hydrology on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record the impact of surrounding ecosystem, land and hydrology on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record the impact of surrounding ecosystem, land and hydrology on site.

pcs.text: Assess physical and cultural constraints on restoration work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess physical and cultural constraints on restoration work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess physical and cultural constraints on restoration work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake a site analysis

elements.title: Develop a concept design for the ecological restoration project

pcs.text: Discuss options and approaches to achieve ecological aims and goals with client

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss options and approaches to achieve ecological aims and goals with client.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare concept design and site maps illustrating location of project work zones.

pcs.text: Specify restoration approaches and treatments for each work zone

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify restoration approaches and treatments for each work zone.

pcs.text: Obtain agreement from stakeholders/supervisor on options and approaches for works

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain agreement from stakeholders/supervisor on options and approaches for works.

pcs.text: Present concept design with supporting documentation for the proposed actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present concept design with supporting documentation for the proposed actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept design with supporting documentation for the proposed actions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop a concept design for the ecological restoration project

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine performance indicators for each project goal and objective.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine methods to measure attainment of project indicators.
